name: Double Strawberry Health Shake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place strawberries, yogurt, ice cubes, milk, and sugar into the blender.
2. Secure the lid tightly on the blender container.
3. Turn off the blender and blend all ingredients together until smooth.
Blend for 1-2 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
4. Serve immediately to enjoy the refreshing Double Strawberry Health Shake.
5. This recipe serves 3 people.
